title: Why do people want NERV logoed merchandise
display_title: Why do people want NERV logoed merchandise
wikitext:
[]: Why do people want NERV logoed merchandise?             Quote Post by Misato's toyboy » Sun Jun 07, 2009 2:16 pm I can understand why character related merchandise is desirable. But why is NERV (& SEELE) logoed merchandise popular? NERV as an organisation, & its leader Gendou, are not nice at all, & would not be nice to work for or under. Why do fanfolk want to identify with it?

[]:             Quote Post by Holy Diver » Sun Jun 07, 2009 3:12 pm It's just a catchy symbol.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sun Jun 07, 2009 3:21 pm It's catchy and also you'll know other Eva/anime fans if they recognize any Nerv/Seele merchandise you have. ...Or something.

[]:             Quote Post by Axell » Sun Jun 07, 2009 4:17 pm why wear anything other than a plain colored shirt? it looks cool

[]:             Quote Post by Baz » Sun Jun 07, 2009 4:23 pm Nerv is just friction and sheeple are peep.

[]:             Quote Post by NAveryW » Thu Jun 11, 2009 2:11 pm You really have to ask why people wear a logo from a show they like?

[]:             Quote Post by Captain_Morgan » Thu Jun 11, 2009 3:05 pm It's better than getting a tattoo.

[]:             Quote Post by Timstuff » Thu Jun 11, 2009 3:27 pm Captain_Morgan wrote: It's better than getting a tattoo.

[]:             Quote Post by SeanTucker » Mon Jun 22, 2009 1:19 am Because God's in his heaven, and all's right with the world. can't believe no one said this already

[]:             Quote Post by Rommel » Mon Jun 22, 2009 11:22 am For the same reason I want McLaren merchandise. Even if they suck now. Because it's cool.

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Jun 22, 2009 11:37 am -looks back at room of Eva stuff- My money! I love my Eva Bag 1. It says NERV so if there are other Eva fans they know I myself am one just as any shirt or logo would do to a fan. 2. It carries things, its amazing.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Mon Jun 22, 2009 11:47 am NAveryW wrote: You really have to ask why people wear a logo from a show they like?

[]:             Quote Post by Omegagouki » Mon Jun 22, 2009 11:51 am Captain_Morgan wrote: It's better than getting a tattoo.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Sat Jun 27, 2009 9:30 am How about this: Bring a mug with the Nerv logo stamped on it to work. Kinda makes you look like the "ooh, look at me, I'm the big boss with the cup with THE logo on it, and I f*ing work for Nerv, b*itches!" Besides, it looks unique and..stands out, I suppose.

[]:             Quote Post by Agentomega » Sun Jun 28, 2009 8:09 pm I'm going to use the HQ version of my avatar as a sticker for the back of my laptop... I also changed my BIOS and Bootscreen to the NERV logo. It's a really cool symbol, at any rate.

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Jun 28, 2009 10:23 pm Someone should wear this on a t-shirt while going to see 2.0 in Japan.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun Jun 28, 2009 10:25 pm ^is that from /b/ ? lame tagline IMO

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Jun 28, 2009 10:29 pm THE Hal E. Burton 9000 wrote: ^is that from /b/ ? lame tagline IMO

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Sun Jun 28, 2009 10:31 pm ever heard of 4chan?

[]:             Quote Post by Sammaeloo » Sun Jun 28, 2009 10:34 pm No idea. Is it something I would regret opening on a computer?
summary:
[]: Why do people want NERV logoed merchandise?             Quote Post by Misato's toyboy » Sun Jun 07, 2009 2:16 pm I can understand why character related merchandise is desirable. But why is NERV (& SEELE) logoed merchandise popular? NERV as an organisation, & its leader Gendou, are not nice at all, & would not be nice to work for or under. Why do fanfolk want to identify with it?

[]:       &n
